backend/main.mo: Defines data types for content items, events, auditions, and manages state for content and scheduling in a Motoko actor.
feature_evidence.json: Contains feature evidence entries mapping features to modified files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Lists prewritten summaries of various frontend files and components for quick reference.
frontend/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS variables, light/dark theme tokens, and applies base background and text styling.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry file mounting the root React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app handling routing, sound autoplay logic, and rendering all site sections and pages.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Manages looping background audio with autoplay detection, fallback behavior, and volume syncing.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: UI for toggling sound and adjusting volume, with autoplay‑blocked recovery handling.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays an access denied message with alerts for non-admin users.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Handles login/logout using Internet Identity with loading states and error recovery.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Shows a modal prompting new authenticated users to enter and save their profile name.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable section wrapper with title, subtitle, icon, and layout styling.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Renders a warning notice and site attribution footer with themed styling.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Creates a sticky header with navigation, mobile menu, logo, and optional sound controls.
frontend/src/components/media/Fullscreen: Fullscreen video modal with play, pause, mute, and close controls.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Displays a grid of audition perks using cards with icons, titles, and descriptions.
Renders signup entry cards for scare actor and dancer auditions with buttons triggering provided callbacks.
Provides a dialog form for dancer audition submissions with validation, login handling, and mutation-based submission.
Implements a dialog form for scare actor audition submissions including validation, authentication checks, and API mutation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Displays audition information, warnings, roles, images, and links to apply for various positions.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Showcases a themed scenic elevation image and description for the Clown Town attraction.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Displays food booth cards with images, pricing alerts, and navigation to booth detail pages, including fallback logic for booth images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Renders a grid of haunted house cards with images, taglines, descriptions, and wait-time info.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Creates the main hero section with background video, branding, promotional text, and a button that scrolls to the auditions section.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeInt: Handles an intro video with autoplay, mute, fullscreen controls, error handling, and an optional fullscreen overlay.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Shows a detailed card describing the 6pm procession with an image and atmospheric text.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Provides operating hours, ticket details, and rules using multiple styled cards and alerts.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Renders a merch storefront with category filtering, a featured booth image, and a grid of merch product cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Displays scare zones in a grid with generated images, titles, taglines, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Shows sneak peeks of selected haunted houses with images, descriptions, and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Lists live shows with images, descriptions, and optional season-only badges.
frontend/src/components/sections/Sliders: Implements a media carousel for the Sliders of Decade show with image/video support, fullscreen, and slide navigation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Teases two new 2027 haunted houses with names, taglines, and descriptive preview text.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Simple teaser card announcing more upcoming content.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Displays upcoming events with images, dates, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Renders layered horror-themed animated background graphics with fire, smoke, chainsaws, blood, and visual effects.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Exports structured content describing themed food booths, each with names, taglines, descriptions, and menu items.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Maps various content categories to generated image asset paths, including houses, zones, booths, shows, events, and auditions.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Defines a list of haunted house attractions with names, taglines, detailed descriptions, and empty subScenes and locations.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Provides a small set of merch shop entries with names, items sold, and pricing.
frontend/src/content/merchStorefront.ts: Defines merch product interfaces, category metadata, and a full catalog of products like hoodies, hats, shirts, posters, and plushies.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Contains an array of scare zone descriptions with names, taglines, and themed horror narratives.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Exports a sneak‑peek description and image metadata for the Schoolhouse haunted house.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Lists live show descriptions with themes, availability, and season‑specific indicators.
frontend/src/content/slidersOfDecade.ts: Defines slider item types and a set of image/video slides plus title text for the Sliders of Decade feature.
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Provides upcoming event entries with descriptions and date info for future attractions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor via React Query, updating on identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionLinks.ts: Fetches audition links from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionSubmission: Implements mutations to submit scare‑actor and dance‑audition forms, mapping UI fields to backend structures.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch the caller's role, admin status, and user profile using the actor and identity states.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoplayVideo.ts: Manages autoplay behavior for a video element, tracking play state, blocked autoplay, and exposing play/pause controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations and category queries on content items via the actor canister.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Handles entering, exiting, and toggling fullscreen mode for a referenced element while tracking fullscreen state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook for managing authentication state, login, logout, and identity loading.
Exports hooks to fetch and update the main haunt schedule, invalidating related queries on changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: Stores and updates sound preference settings in localStorage with enabled state and volume level.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles, horror-themed color variables, Tailwind layers, and overrides for typography and text colors.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Provides formatting utilities for dates, content types, and type-specific field summaries for content items.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/AuditionsPage.tsx: Displays audition listings with loading, error, and success states, filtering out placeholder links.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Shows a full event calendar with filtering, date grouping, hash navigation, and item detail dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Renders a sneak‑peek page for the Clown Town haunted house using content and generated imagery.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Implements the admin CMS for managing content items and schedules with authentication and CRUD dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Shows a detailed preview of the Hell Hole haunted house plus an additional scenic feature section.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Displays details for the Laser Hell scare zone with back navigation and fallback if missing.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Presents a sneak‑peek page for the Schoolhouse attraction with image, title, and description.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Renders the Sharks Hell food booth page with image, description, and menu, including navigation back to the booth list.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Displays the Slider Doom food booth with its image, details, and menu, and includes a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlaySneakPe: Shows a sneak peek page for the Toys Come to Play haunted house with its image, tagline, and description.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Utility functions for comparing dates, generating date keys, incrementing dates, and expanding date ranges into individual days.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading, storing, persisting, and clearing URL and session-based parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, container settings, animations, and utilities.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing haunted house additions, asset requirements, and feature request statuses.
